title: Establishment of ITRA
content: Paul Flood is recorded here as co-founder of the Irish Tag Rugby Association. This should be backed with ITRA archive material before being treated as a primary-source claim.

title: Passing of Paul Flood
content: Paul Flood passed away at age 53. Irish Rugby published a tribute/obituary on 4 April 2008.

title: Inaugural Cup Final
content: First Paul Flood Memorial Cup final held at Templeville Road between St. Mary’s College RFC and Old Belvedere RFC.

title: First Paul Flood Cup presented
content: Andrea Flood presented the cup to St. Mary’s after the inaugural final; Jonathan Flood gave a speech about his father.

title: Roll-call by 2014
content: Clondalkin’s 2014 match report describes Clondalkin joining previous winners St. Mary’s, Galwegians and Old Belvedere.
